commands.name: SQL SELECT 1 via readonly MCP container
command: import pyexasol, os, ssl; dsn=os.environ["EXASOL_HOST"]+":"+os.environ["EXASOL_PORT"]; c=pyexasol.connect(dsn=dsn, user=os.environ["EXASOL_USER"], password=os.environ["EXASOL_PASSWORD"], encryption=True, websocket_sslopt={"cert_reqs": ssl.CERT_NONE}); print(c.execute("SELECT 1").fetchval())

commands.name: SQL ANALYTICS.CUSTOMER_EVENTS count via readonly MCP container
command: import pyexasol, os, ssl; dsn=os.environ["EXASOL_HOST"]+":"+os.environ["EXASOL_PORT"]; c=pyexasol.connect(dsn=dsn, user=os.environ["EXASOL_USER"], password=os.environ["EXASOL_PASSWORD"], encryption=True, websocket_sslopt={"cert_reqs": ssl.CERT_NONE}); print(c.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANALYTICS.CUSTOMER_EVENTS").fetchval())
